items.name: heurist-agent-framework
items.description: A flexible multi-interface AI agent framework for building agents with reasoning, tool use, memory, deep research, blockchain interaction, MCP, and agents-as-a-service.

items.name: boluobobo-ai-court-tutorial
items.description: AI 朝廷搭建完整教程 - 从零基础到进阶

items.name: nono
items.description: Secure, kernel-enforced sandbox CLI and SDKs for AI agents. Capability-based isolation with secure key management, atomic rollback, cryptographic immutable audit chain of provenance. Run your agents in a zero-trust environment.

items.name: opencode-swarm
items.description: Architect-centric agentic swarm plugin for OpenCode. Hub-and-spoke orchestration with SME consultation, code generation, and QA review.

items.name: vexa
items.description: Open-source meeting transcription API for Google Meet, Microsoft Teams & Zoom. Auto-join bots, real-time WebSocket transcripts, MCP server for AI agents. Self-host or use hosted SaaS.

items.name: superset
items.description: IDE for the AI Agents Era - Run an army of Claude Code, Codex, etc. on your machine

items.name: yutu
items.description: The AI agent that grows your YouTube channel on autopilot.

items.name: agentfactory
items.description: Build Digital FTEs that work 24/7. Your domain expertise—whether in sales, legal, finance, or healthcare—becomes an autonomous AI agent that never sleeps.

items.name: mission-control
items.description: The open-source dashboard for AI agent orchestration. Manage agent fleets, track tasks, monitor costs, and orchestrate workflows — with direct CLI integration, GitHub sync, and real-time monitoring.
